name: Sidebar icons are distinct per feature after de-duplication
description: After TASK G de-duplication, verify the sidebar renders distinct icons for Feynman (Microphone), Study Planner (Pencil), Practice Exam (Document), and Eureka (Lightbulb). No two adjacent items should share the same icon sprite.

planSteps.description: Log in with test credentials and wait for the dashboard to load fully.
The sidebar is visible with navigation items for the study features.
The Feynman Mode sidebar item is visible and has an icon (sprite or image).
The Study Planner sidebar item is visible and has an icon distinct from Feynman's.
Click on the Feynman Mode sidebar item to navigate.
The Feynman Mode page renders — a heading or content area related to explanation/evaluation is visible.
